time_bands.label: Night
time_bands.hours_rule: 00:00-08:00 any day (including weekends). H12x assessment series.

complexity_levels.label: Minor
complexity_levels.definition: Single system or single site; brief history and exam.

complexity_levels.label: Comprehensive
complexity_levels.definition: Full history (meds, PMHx, social) + exam + review of one system in depth.

complexity_levels.label: Multiple systems
complexity_levels.definition: Detailed history and exam of more than one organ system.

complexity_levels.label: Re-assessment
complexity_levels.definition: Repeat assessment same visit. Max 2/patient/physician/day. Not payable for discharge, admission by ED MD, or when it leads to a consult referral.

complexity_levels.label: Consultation
complexity_levels.definition: Referred consultation to the ED physician (H055 specialist/FRCP, H065 family/CCFP-EM).

complexity_levels.label: Critical care
complexity_levels.definition: Life-threatening resuscitation; billed time-based via G521/G523/G522 instead of an H assessment. No re-assessment with critical care.

complexity_levels.label: Resuscitation
complexity_levels.definition: Non-G521 resuscitation billed time-based via G395/G391.

svp_rule: SVP requires an A-prefix assessment; cannot attach to an H-prefix ED code
svp_rule_detail: Special Visit Premiums require an A-prefix assessment code (A001/A007/A003). They CANNOT be billed with H-prefix ED assessment codes (H101-H154). The premium code itself is K-prefix when not on-call, or H9xx-prefix when on-call. After the max number of premiums per period is reached, revert to H-prefix assessment codes. (DoctorCare ON ER Special Premiums QRG, Feb 2026)
procedure_stacking: procedures bill on top of the assessment
fee_notes: H-prefix ED assessment codes received a 4.33% increase effective 2025-04-01 (OHIP Bulletin 260102, 2024 PSA). Amounts here are the pre-increase schedule values -> treat as a FLOOR; confirm exact current $ against the live SOB before submission.

Amounts marked amount_confirmed:false have a sourced CODE but no confirmed $ on the fetched sheets (mostly fracture F-codes, dislocation D-codes, and procedures the sheets list without a price). Confirm $ against the SOB.
Re-assessments limited to 2/patient/physician/day; not payable for discharge, admission by the ED MD, or when they lead to a consult referral.
